caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a black t-shirt with the phrase "CHECK IT" printed on the chest sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional microphone on a stand. In the background, a white banner features five black stars and the word "HUSTLE," while a red logo reads "BOSS TALK 101." On-screen graphics include a "BOSS TALK PODCAST" logo and a smaller "BOSS TALK 101" watermark with the text "By: T-Legoe Studio." Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. Initially, he has both hands raised and open in an explanatory gesture. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his hands, eventually pointing his right thumb toward himself while continuing to speak into the microphone. He wears a gold chain around his neck and a gold bracelet on his right wrist.
